title: MikroTik RBOmniTikPG-5HacD, OmniTIK 5 POE ac
description: OmniTIK 5 ac is an outdoor access point with two built-in omni-directional 5 GHz antennas with a 7,5dBi gain, 5x Gigabit LAN and one USB port for 3G/4G modem . Omnitik 5 ac supports 802.11a/n/ac wireless standards, transmission power up to 1300mW (31dBm) , and modulation speed up to 866Mbps OmniTIK 5 ac can be powered only through the first port labeled POE IN and supporting passive PoE 12 to 57V . Omnitik also supports 802.3af/at POE . Ethernet ports 2-5 can power other PoE capable devices with the same voltage as applied to the unit. Less power adapters and cables to worry about! It can power 48V devices (like IP camera), if 48V input is used Device Gigabit PoE injector Power adapter 28V / 2.57A + cable Metal ring Pole mount bracket
